   - Mean = exp(μ + σ²/2) = exp(11.99 + 0.02) ≈ \$162 k  
   - 95% CI ≈ [\$108 k,\$239 k]  

These parameters capture our uncertainty about the population‐level average midpoint while respecting the positive, skewed nature of salaries.
